title: word
description: These are all words for a unit of language used to express something.

definitions.definition: a single unit of language that means something and can be spoken or written:

examples.en: Do not write more than 200 words.
examples.cn: 写的东西不要超过 200 字。

examples.en: He uses a lot of long words.

definitions.definition: (rather formal) a word or phrase used as the name of something, especially one connected with a particular type of language:指词语、术语、措辞：

examples.en: ‘Old man’ is a slang term for ‘father’.
examples.cn: old man 为俚语，指父亲。

definitions.definition: a group of words that have a particular meaning when used together: In grammar, a phrase is a group of words without a finite verb, especially one that forms part of a sentence: ‘the green car’ and ‘on Friday morning’ are phrases.

examples.cn: 谁创造了“假新闻”这个短语？

examples.en: He tends to use a lot of slang expressions that I’ve never heard before.
examples.cn: 他往往用许多我以前从未听说过的俚语。

definitions.definition: a group of words whose meaning is different from the meanings of the individual words:

examples.en: ‘Let the cat out of the bag’ is an idiom meaning to tell a secret by mistake.
examples.cn: “让猫从袋子里跑出来”是惯用语，意思是无意中泄露秘密。
